Notice Of Motion To Extend The Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Louis Felder III's Motion to extend the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted per 1/19/2007's stipulation. Order signed. Arbitrator jurisdiction is extended to 6/1/2007. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 7/5/2007 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Court to give notice. Proceedings not reported. (212)
